name: specific re-entry with artifact
message: Don't restart the whole course. Return to “tool use and web search”: Explain what the model checked, not only what tool use does. Spend 10 minutes on one artifact: Rewrite one sentence in notes/tool-use.md. Check: The sentence names both the external action and the returned evidence. Source: Deep Dive into LLMs like ChatGPT → https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7xTGNNLPyMI
reason: The message selects the open loop, timeboxes one artifact, and cites the primary source.

name: generic encouragement
message: Keep going. You are doing great. Do you want to study AI today?
reason: It could be sent to anyone and does not identify an artifact or source.

name: persona simulation
message: Karpathy would say you should keep learning.
